info.name: Inspection Management System API
info.description:
RESTful API for the Item Inspection Management System (Laravel 12, modular).

Workflow: open -> for_review -> completed. Content is editable only while open.

Set `base_url` (default http://localhost:8000) and run **Create Inspection** first to populate `inspection_id`. Seed the database with `php artisan migrate --seed`.

Every request includes saved example responses (success and error).

item.name: Master Data
item.description: Prefetch endpoints, fetched once on app load and cached client-side.

request.description: All dropdown reference data plus service_type and status enums. scopes_of_work embed their parameters.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Items with nested lots. Source for the Order Information cascading filter.

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: request_no, date_submitted, estimated_completion_date, status, related_to, created_at. Prefix - for desc.

request.description:
Paginated list with status_counts for the tabs (Spatie Query Builder).

Query params:
- filter[status]: open | for_review | completed (omit for all)
- sort: request_no | date_submitted | estimated_completion_date | status | related_to | created_at (prefix - for desc)
- per_page: integer 1-100 (default 15)
- page: integer

Response shape: data { items, pagination, status_counts }.

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: request_no, date_submitted, estimated_completion_date, status, related_to, created_at. Prefix - for desc.

originalRequest.description:
Paginated list with status_counts for the tabs (Spatie Query Builder).

Query params:
- filter[status]: open | for_review | completed (omit for all)
- sort: request_no | date_submitted | estimated_completion_date | status | related_to | created_at (prefix - for desc)
- per_page: integer 1-100 (default 15)
- page: integer

Response shape: data { items, pagination, status_counts }.

request.description:
Create an inspection (saved as `open`). request_no is auto-generated; status is forced to open.

Required:
- service_type: new_arrival | maintenance | on_spot
- items: array, min 1
- items[].item_id: exists in items
- items[].qty_required: numeric >= 0
- items[].lots: array, min 1
- items[].lots[].item_lot_id: exists in item_lots
- items[].lots[].qty: numeric >= 0

Optional:
- inspection_type_id, scope_of_work_id, location_id, customer_id: must exist
- related_to, dvc_code, note_to_yard: string
- date_submitted, estimated_completion_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- charge_to_customer: boolean (default false)
- items[].inspection_required: boolean (default true)

Ignored if sent: request_no, status.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description:
Full inspection detail: header, scope_of_work + parameters, items + lots, charges.

Query params:
- include: statusHistories (optional opt-in relation; omitted by default)

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Replace inspection content. Same body and rules as Create.

Allowed only while status is `open`; otherwise returns 403 (InspectionNotEditable).

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description:
Replace inspection content. Same body and rules as Create.

Allowed only while status is `open`; otherwise returns 403 (InspectionNotEditable).

response.name: 403 Not Editable (locked)

originalRequest.description:
Replace inspection content. Same body and rules as Create.

Allowed only while status is `open`; otherwise returns 403 (InspectionNotEditable).

request.description:
Body: { "status": "<target>" }. status is required.

Allowed transitions (enforced server-side): open -> for_review -> completed.
Any other transition (e.g. open -> completed, or moving backward) returns 422.

response.name: 200 OK
